description: Development of Deep RL based pursuit evasion solver with fixed wing UAV agents. Fighter pilot behavior cloning for Deep RL based aerobatic maneuvers.

Implemented Deep RL-based motion planners using Robot Operating System (ROS) and Gazebo. Tested performance on Sim-to-Real experiments using TurtleBot3. Developed an energy-based model using an action maximization technique.
Investigated multi-agent task scheduling using RL techniques to minimize queuing delays. Devised a novel path planning algorithm for Robotic Mobile Fulfillment Systems.
Developed an object detection model for fire using thermal images. Extracted saliency maps from thermal images using BAS-Net and performed object detection using YOLOv7.
